arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Al-Hilal – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid face Al-Hilal in their opening fixture of the FIFA Club World Cup this evening. The Spanish side are aiming to win a record-extending sixth Club World Cup title and face the Saudi Pro League outfit in their group stage opener. arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe is ‘serious doubt’ for Real Madrid Club World Cup debut against Al-Hilal
arts.sum: Real Madrid will make their bow in the Club World Cup on Wednesday night at 21:00 CEST, in a match full of unknowns for Los Blancos. The latest is star striker Kylian Mbappe, who is a late doubt for the game. The French superstar missed Real Madrid’s final training session ahead of their game against […] The post Kylian Mbappe is ‘serious doubt’ for Real Madrid Club World Cup debut against Al-Hilal appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Al Hilal: Xabi Alonso Awards Two Debuts
arts.sum: While the Argentine teenager will represent River Plate at the FIFA Club World Cup, Alexander-Arnold and Huijsen are set to make their debuts for Real Madrid in the newly expanded tournament. The biggest club in the world had a busy summer after finishing the 2024–25 season without a major trophy ; Los Blancos replaced Carlo Ancelotti with Alonso and then signed Trent Alexander-Arnold, Dean Huijsen and Franco Mastantuono.

arts.ttl: ’I Wouldn’t Be Surprised’-Al Hilal CEO Makes Bold Vinicius Junior Transfer Prediction
arts.sum: Al Hilal CEO Esteve Calzada believes that the Saudi Pro League is capable of attracting any player, including Real Madrid superstar Vinícius Júnior, but has denied holding direct talks with the Brazilian. Despite this, Calzada, who previously worked in a management role for the City Football Group, believes that one day, Vinícius could wind up in the Saudi Pro League.
